channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Snowflake CEO: A major myth underlies every org chart
item.description: Plus: All the latest news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: Tech leaders move beyond AI hype: What is actually working
item.description: Senior tech leaders from Mars, Orange, Reckitt, and Saint-Gobain share how to turn AI ambition into enterprise transformation.

item.title: Wall Street surprised by global sell-off amid AI bubble fears before SpaceX IPO
item.description: Everything you need to know before reaching the office this morning.

item.title: Low-budget comedy sequel outperforms expensive action film at box office
item.description: The spoof film "Scary Movie" earned $55 million over the weekend, easily surpassing "Masters of the Universe."
